news.summary: The QPL electromechanical power relays with a rating of 25A fulfill the criteria outlined in the MIL-PRF-83536 specification and have obtained ISO-9001 certification.
news.headline: Microchip introduces BR235 and BR235D Series power relays, meeting MIL-PRF-83536 spec, rated at 25A, ideal for military apps.

news.summary: hc1 has recently introduced HerCare, a new module in its MyBloodHealth platform, focusing on maternal health by detecting and managing anemia risks during pregnancy. This technology utilizes lab data to provide crucial health insights, emphasizing on women's health enhancement. Anemia in pregnancy, a prevalent but preventable issue, is the key focus of this initiative. HerCare marks a significant step in hc1's dedication to utilizing technology for identifying and addressing health risks.
news.headline: hc1 launches HerCare on MyBloodHealth to protect maternal health by addressing anemia in pregnancy, utilizing lab data insights.
Jotul AS completes successful recapitalization, boosting financial strength and growth prospects.
Onex renews normal course issuer bid for purchasing up to 10% of outstanding shares.

news.summary: On April 15, 2025, Advanced Flower Capital Inc. (NASDAQ: AFCG) disclosed that the financial results for the first quarter ending on March 31, 2025, will be unveiled on Wednesday, May 14th, 2025, before the market opens. The management of AFC will delve into the financial outcomes at 10:00 am ET through a webcast on the Investor Relations webpage at AFC - Investor Relations. Those interested can participate in the conference call by pre-registering at a provided link. An event replay will be accessible an hour post the conclusion of the call.
news.headline: Advanced Flower Capital to release Q1 results on May 14, 2025 at 10:00 am ET via webcast, registration required for call.

news.summary: Toronto - Tide, the leading laundry detergent brand in Canada, is partnering with Ronald McDonald House Charities® (RMHC®) to commemorate National Laundry Day. Tide Loads of Hope has been dedicated to enhancing and expanding laundry programs at RMHC locations nationwide, offering families the comforts of home. Through this partnership, Tide aims to demonstrate the tangible benefits of these efforts.
news.headline: Tide partners with RMHC Canada to expand laundry programs, providing comfort to families across the country. #LoadsOfHope

news.summary: KB Home (NYSE: KBH), a leading homebuilder in the U.S., revealed the launch of Cedar Crossings in Haines City, offering new homes tailored to modern living. The community boasts one- and two-story floor plans with up to six bedrooms, three-and-a-half baths, spacious great rooms, bedrooms with walk-in closets, and lofts. Cedar Crossings aims to cater to current lifestyle needs.
news.headline: KB Home opens Cedar Crossings in Haines City, FL - offers new homes with up to 6 beds, 3.5 baths; designed for modern living.

news.summary: Gauzy has announced that they are experiencing little to no effects from the recent U.S. tariffs. This is attributed to their operations involving local production, U.S. subsidiaries, and the Free Trade Agreement. These factors have allowed Gauzy to effectively navigate the tariffs, ensuring that their business remains stable amidst the trade changes.
news.headline: Gauzy unaffected by new U.S. tariffs, thanks to local production and subsidiaries, FTA protection.

news.summary: In Jonestown, Pennsylvania, as of April 15, 2025, JBT Bancorp, Inc. (OTCQX: JBTC) announced their quarterly earnings for the first quarter of 2025. They reported a profit of $1,687,000, which translates to $0.69 per share. This marks a significant growth compared to the earnings of $1,307,000, or $0.54 per share, from the previous year. President Troy A. Peters emphasized the company's focus on enhancing net interest income and non-interest income sources as the driving factors behind their first-quarter performance. Net interest income, following credit loss expenses, saw a notable increase of 7.87% compared to the same period in the previous year. Additionally, non-interest income surged by 13.13%, largely attributed to the growth in debit card interchange. The interchange income benefitted from higher transaction volume and amounts processed during this period.
news.headline: JBTC Inc. earns $1,687,000 in Q1 2025, up from $1,307,000 in Q1 2024, with $0.69 per share vs. $0.54. President cites rise in interest and non-interest income sources as key factors.

news.summary: Atlanta, GA, April 15, 2025 - Regional Health Properties, Inc. (RHEP, RHEPA) and SunLink Health Systems, Inc. (SSY) have announced a revised merger agreement. SunLink will merge with Regional, with approximately 1,595,401 shares of Regional common stock and 1,408,121 shares of the newly-authorized Series D 8% Cumulative Convertible Redeemable Participating Preferred Shares being issued in exchange. The Series D Preferred Stock holds an initial liquidation preference of $12.50 per share. Both companies’ boards of directors have approved the merger agreement. The merger is contingent on shareholder approvals from both Regional and SunLink, regulatory approvals, and meeting customary closing conditions.
news.headline: Regional Health Properties and SunLink Health Systems revise all-stock merger. Approx 1,595,401 shares of common stock issued.

news.summary: Top South African businessman, Sipho Maseko, former CEO of Telkom SA Soc Ltd and MD of Vodacom SA, has recently become a member of the board of directors at ASP Isotopes Inc. Known for his expertise in telecom, Mr. Maseko brings a vast experience of leading major companies to his new role. This development is seen as a significant move for ASP Isotopes Inc, who are likely to benefit from Mr. Maseko's strategic insights and leadership skills.
news.headline: South African businessman Mr. Sipho Maseko, former CEO of Telkom SA Soc Ltd, joins board of ASP Isotopes Inc.

news.summary: In a recent announcement on April 15, 2025, RSA Conference LLC, the organization responsible for hosting the renowned cybersecurity event, revealed the honorees of the RSAC™ 2025 Conference Lifetime Achievement Awards. Among the recipients is Burt Kaliski, who serves as the Senior Vice President. This recognition adds to the prestige of the event, which has established itself as the leading cybersecurity conference globally.
news.headline: RSA Conference LLC will honor Lifetime Achievement and Excellence in Math Awards at RSAC™ 2025 Conference; recipient is Burt Kaliski, Senior VP.

news.summary: TransGlobal Assets Inc. (stock symbol: TMSH) and The Now Corporation (stock symbol: NWPN) have collaborated on a strategic partnership to bring the esteemed creations of Michael Berman to market. This agreement between the two companies holds significant potential for commercializing Berman's works. Investors and stakeholders are eagerly anticipating the outcomes of this collaboration in the OTC market.
news.headline: TransGlobal Assets Inc. (OTC: TMSH) and The Now Corporation (OTC: NWPN) partner to commercialize Michael Berman's acclaimed works.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the country's economy grew by 4.5% in the second quarter of the fiscal year, exceeding expectations by 0.2%. This growth was primarily driven by a 7% increase in consumer spending, while government spending also saw a significant boost of 5.2%. However, exports only grew by 1.8%, falling short of the projected 3%. Despite this, the overall growth rate for the year is still expected to reach a healthy 5%. Additionally, unemployment rates have declined to 3.9%, down from 4.2% in the previous quarter. This positive trend is expected to continue as the government implements new policies to support small businesses and attract foreign investments.
news.headline: ON Semiconductor cancels $6.9B offer to buy Allegro.

news.summary: A new regulatory framework could allow Robinhood and Coinbase to list a wider range of digital assets and tokenized equities. Influenced by bills like FIT21 and the Lummis-Gillibrand Responsible Financial Innovation Act, this framework could enable platforms to trade both securities and non-securities under SEC and CFTC oversight. This change would significantly expand Robinhood's market potential as it currently offers only major cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Solana. The report by Bernstein suggests that this regulatory clarity could lead to a more competitive landscape in the investment platform industry, fostering integrated multi-asset trading environments. Overall, this change could revolutionize the offerings of Robinhood and Coinbase, allowing them to diversify beyond their current limitations.
news.headline: Regulatory framework may expand crypto offerings for Robinhood and Coinbase, impacting market competition.

news.summary: The Brownie’s Mutt Strut event, presented by Subaru of Daytona, is the Halifax Humane Society's primary community fundraising event. Scheduled for Saturday, May 3rd at Riverfront Esplanade in Daytona Beach, the event kicks off with a "Walk for Animals" at 9 am. Following this, from 10 am to 2 pm, attendees can enjoy various activities for both humans and canines, including canine activity zones, free pet adoptions, a food truck rally, beer garden, and live DJs. This year's event is expected to attract a large crowd, showcasing the community's support with a day full of fun and fundraising opportunities.
news.headline: Brownie's Mutt Strut, sponsored by Subaru of Daytona, is Halifax Humane Society's key annual fundraiser. Event on May 3rd includes dog show, walk, and activity zones.

news.summary: On April 15, 2025, Blue Moon Metals Inc. disclosed that its common shares, traded as "BMOOF" on the TSXV and OTCQX under the symbols "MOON" and "BMOOF" respectively, have been listed on the OTCQX ® Best Market, indicating progress from the OTCQB ® Venture Market. This shift signifies a significant step forward in Blue Moon's development, enhancing its market presence and potentially attracting more investors.
news.headline: Blue Moon Metals moves up to OTCQX market, trading as "BMOOF", from OTCQB with symbol "MOON", marking growth.

news.summary: In BROMONT, Québec, Boréas Technologies has revealed that NIO, a leading global smart electric vehicle company, has incorporated Boréas’ automotive haptic module into the touch interface called TUI Bar in the NIO ET9. This integration enhances the tactile experience in NIO ET9, the brand’s Smart Electric Executive Flagship, positioning it as the first technologically luxurious electric vehicle to provide exceptionally responsive haptic feedback. Boréas Technologies specializes in third-generation, piezo-based haptic technology for a range of sectors including automotive, consumer, and mobile applications. This advancement signifies a significant milestone in the automotive industry, showcasing the commitment to innovation and user experience.
news.headline: Boréas Technologies integrates haptic module in NIO ET9, world's first tech-luxury EV with tactile feedback.

news.summary: In Basel on April 15, 2025, Sandoz revealed the successful approval of all Board of Directors' proposals at its Annual General Meeting. This included the 2024 Annual Financial Statements, Consolidated Financial Statements, and the report on non-financial matters. Of the 1,072 shareholders present, along with votes from the independent proxy, accounted for 75.73% of shares with voting rights.
news.headline: Shareholders approve Sandoz Group AG resolutions at AGM; 1,072 in attendance, representing 75.73% of voting shares.

news.summary: A private equity firm specializing in aerospace and industrial investments, Avem Partners, has disclosed the acquisition of FMI Aerostructures, Inc. based in Valencia, Calif. The deal includes a significant investment, with undisclosed monetary figures.
news.headline: Private equity firm Avem Partners completes acquisition of FMI Aerostructures, Inc, focusing on aerospace and industrial investments.

news.summary: In Portland, Oregon, Payfinia has strengthened its executive team by welcoming two FinTech and Payment industry experts, Lisa St. Germain and Justin Epstein. The addition of St. Germain and Epstein signifies a significant enhancement to the growing payments company's leadership.
news.headline: Payfinia in Portland, adds FinTech and Payment experts Lisa St. Germain and Justin Epstein to their team.

news.summary: A collaboration has been revealed between Mahalo Banking and Call Federal Credit Union, headquartered in Richmond, Virginia. Through this partnership, the digital banking experience offered by Mahalo Banking is set to undergo improvements.
news.headline: Call Federal Credit Union partners with Mahalo Banking to boost digital services, streamline core transition.

news.summary: Trabian Technology, Inc., a prominent software development company specializing in financial services innovation, has recently acquired the Mesh platform from Core10, Inc. This acquisition aims to enhance Trabian's market presence and boost its capacity to provide cutting-edge solutions. The Mesh platform is a robust middleware platform that improves banking operations. This strategic move will enable Trabian to offer more innovative, dependable, and scalable solutions to community financial institutions.
news.headline: Trabian acquires Mesh platform from Core10 to enhance banking operations and innovation capabilities. Expands market presence.

news.summary: Vital infrastructure such as hospitals, schools, transportation routes, and water and power initiatives are encompassed in the critical infrastructure sector. Advisory and consulting services will play a key role in steering forthcoming stages of projects. On April 15, 2025, in Dallas, Jacobs (NYSE: J) secured a contract with the Virgin Islands Public Finance Authority.
news.headline: Jacobs wins contract to manage rebuilding of U.S. Virgin Islands, focusing on critical infrastructure.

news.summary: The store previously known as Curaleaf West Palm Beach Clematis has undergone a transformation to become the first licensed dispensary to specialize in hemp products. This rebranded location based in Stamford, Connecticut made the transition in April 15, 2025. Curaleaf Holdings, Inc. (TSX: CURA) (OTCQX: CURLF), a prominent global company in the cannabis industry, oversaw this change.
news.headline: Curaleaf opens first dedicated hemp store in West Palm Beach, FL, transitioning from dispensary.(Symbol: CURA, CURLF)

news.summary: Boston Globe Media is preparing a widespread campaign to engage with the community on Race Day on April 21, 2025. They will offer in-depth coverage of the 129th Boston Marathon, including articles, images, and clips to convey the essence of the event. The platform will showcase a variety of content, aiming to reach a wide audience with updates and highlights. This initiative seeks to immerse the viewers in the Marathon experience and provide them with valuable insights.
news.headline: Boston Globe Media prepares for in-depth coverage of 129th Boston Marathon on April 21, 2025, utilizing various platforms.

news.summary: On April 15, 2025, in St. Louis, Peabody revealed it had secured a deal to supply between seven and eight million tons of coal annually to Associated Electric Cooperative Inc. (Associated). The contract spans a minimum of seven years and signifies a significant partnership between the two entities.
news.headline: Peabody signed 7-8 million ton coal contract with Associated Electric for 7 years. St Louis based.
Dr. Wolf Schmuhl is the new CFO at trivago, a leading app in the travel industry.

news.summary: In Dublin, the "Survey of the European Denim Fairs for Spring/Summer 2026" report by Textiles Intelligence Ltd. is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. This report covers the European denim fairs for the mentioned season, highlighting trends in color, design, manufacturing, and materials. The fairs showcased the latest innovations in denim fabrics, with key colors being bright, vibrant, and enlivening. This valuable resource provides insights into the industry's direction, making it a must-have for professionals in the field.
news.headline: European Denim Fairs for Spring/Summer 2026 showcased key trends in color, design, manufacturing, and materials; vibrant colors were highlighted.

news.summary: In Toronto on April 15, 2025, Profound Medical Corp. (NASDAQ: PROF; TSX: PRN) revealed new information about its upcoming hybrid investor event on April 28, 2025. This commercial medical device company offers incision-free therapies for tissue ablation. The event will combine in-person and virtual attendance and will occur alongside the American Urological Association’s Annual Meeting.
news.headline: Profound Medical Corp announces hybrid investor event on April 28, 2025 at AUA Annual Meeting.

news.summary: Bitcoin (BTC) is projected to trade within a range of $73,000 to $94,000, as indicated by a recent report from 10x Research analysts. The strategy of selling calls and puts to capture premium is deemed effective within this trading range. Analysis of market dynamics amidst trade war uncertainties reveals a lack of clear momentum drivers and evolving investor behaviors within the cryptocurrency sector. Bitcoin ETF inflows have been modest, totaling $225 million year-to-date as of April, with the potential to decline due to market uncertainty stemming from President Donald Trump's tariff policies. This has led to three consecutive months of outflows for Bitcoin ETFs, initially driven by hedge funds focusing on arbitrage rather than genuine demand. Notwithstanding, a new group of buyers holding between 100 and 1,000 BTC emerged following Elon Musk's endorsement of Trump in August 2024, leading to an increase in their holdings.
news.headline: Bitcoin trading between $73,000 to $94,000. 10x Research suggests selling calls and puts for profit due to uncertain market dynamics. Bitcoin ETF inflows $225M year-to-date. Hedge funds driving outflows. New buyers emerged after Elon Musk's endorsement.

news.summary: According to cybersecurity experts, the exploit is believed to have occurred as a result of manipulating the price oracle of the decentralized exchange.
news.headline: KiloEX, backed by Binance, halts activities after $7.5M exploit. Researchers suggest oracle price manipulation caused breach.

news.summary: Adverum Biotechnologies, Inc., a company based in Redwood City, California, and listed on Nasdaq as ADVM, specializes in using gene therapy to protect eyesight in common eye diseases. The company recently disclosed its financial performance for Q4 and the entire year of 2024. Along with this, they shared updates on their current projects and expected future goals.
news.headline: Adverum Biotechnologies reports Q4 & full year 2024 financial results, provides pipeline updates. $ADVM Nasdaq: ADVM.

news.summary: ZINFI Technologies, Inc., based in Pleasanton, California, has secured the top spot in the "Satisfaction" metric with a significant 20-point lead over its closest competitor among the five companies in the leader's quadrant. ZINFI is pioneering Unified Partner Management solutions and remains ahead in the industry as of April 15, 2025.
news.headline: ZINFI named leader in G2's Spring 2025 report for Partner Relationship Management Software, holds 20-point lead in "Satisfaction" metric.

news.summary: Vince Holding Corp., a global contemporary retailer trading on the NYSE under the symbol VNCE, appointed Yuji Okumura as its Chief Financial Officer, effective April 14, 2025. Okumura, who previously served as the interim CFO since March 2025 and Controller since September 2020, was praised by Brendan Hoffman, the Chief Executive Officer of VNCE, for his leadership and financial prowess. Hoffman expressed confidence in Okumura's abilities to lead the financial operations of the company moving forward.
news.headline: Vince Holding Corp appoints Yuji Okumura as CFO, effective April 14, 2025. Okumura was interim CFO since March 2025.

news.summary: TULSA, Oklahoma - Williams is set to announce its financial results for the first quarter of 2025 on May 5. Following this announcement, an earnings conference call and webcast are scheduled for May 6.
news.headline: Williams will release Q1 2025 financial results on May 5, with earnings call and webcast scheduled for May 6.

news.summary: A webcast and conference call for Organon's Q1 2025 earnings results will be hosted on May 1, 2025, in Jersey City, New Jersey.
news.headline: Organon to release Q1 2025 results and hold conference call on May 1, 2025 in Jersey City, N.J.

news.summary: A recent report revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has surged to 6.7%, the highest level in the past decade. This increase has resulted in approximately 3.2 million individuals losing their jobs in the last quarter. The statistics indicate a worrying trend as the economy continues to struggle amid the ongoing pandemic. Additionally, the report highlighted that the youth unemployment rate has reached 18.5%, emphasizing the challenges faced by young people in finding employment opportunities. Experts are concerned about the long-term effects of this rise in unemployment and emphasize the need for immediate government intervention to address the issue. The data also revealed disparities among different regions, with urban areas experiencing a higher unemployment rate compared to rural areas. The government has acknowledged the seriousness of the situation and has promised to implement measures to stimulate job growth and support those affected by job losses.
news.headline: RFK Jr.'s misinformed autism claims are criticized in an article on Bloomberg, reflecting his lack of understanding.

news.summary: In order to achieve Ontario's ambitious target of 1.5 million homes by 2031, there is a critical need to accelerate the pace of home construction. The Ontario Real Estate Association (OREA) has introduced a new policy report titled "Building More, Building Faster," emphasizing the importance of adopting factory-built homes as a solution. This approach involves utilizing innovative building techniques and materials such as mass timber and Canadian steel, readily available in Ontario, to streamline construction processes. By shifting towards factory-built or prefabricated housing, which involves constructing homes in a factory using prefabricated 3D components, significant time and cost savings can be realized without compromising quality or community aesthetics. This strategy aims to address Ontario's persistent housing supply and affordability challenges efficiently.
news.headline: Factory-built housing is a key solution for Ontario's housing crisis, with a goal of 1.5M homes by 2031. Ontario Real Estate Association emphasizes the importance of embracing prefabricated homes to save time and money in construction.

news.summary: In Victoria, British Columbia, Vecima's Entra vCMTS has been chosen by Cox Communications, the largest private broadband provider in the US, for the upgrade and improvement of its DOCSIS network.
news.headline: Vecima's Entra vCMTS chosen by Cox Communications to upgrade its DOCSIS network, the largest US private broadband provider.

news.summary: Darwinbox has recently appointed Sudi Bjornstad Korba as the new Senior Vice President of Sales for North America. This strategic move aims to bolster the company's presence in the region and drive growth in sales. With this appointment, Darwinbox is looking to tap into the North American market and leverage Korba's expertise to accelerate their sales efforts.
news.headline: HR tech leader Sudi Bjornstad Korba appointed SVP of North America Sales for Darwinbox, as per Business Wire.

news.summary: In Boise, Idaho, Albertsons Companies, Inc. recently disclosed its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and full year of fiscal 2024, concluding on February 22, 2025.
news.headline: Albertsons Companies, Inc. released Q4 and full year results for fiscal 2024, ending Feb 22, 2025 in Boise, Idaho.

news.summary: Janover Inc (NASDAQ: JNVR) revealed on Tuesday the acquisition of 80,567 Solana (CRYPTO: SOL) tokens, costing around $10.5 million. This move signifies the company's third transaction following the adoption of its digital asset treasury approach. With this latest purchase, Janover now holds a total of 163,651.7 Solana tokens, valued at approximately $21.2 million, inclusive of rewards from staking activities. This development comes after the company previously bought $4.6 million worth of Solana tokens. For further details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Janover buys $10.5 million of Solana in new treasury strategy, now holds 163,651.7 SOL worth $21.2 million.

news.summary: Duchesnay Pharmaceutical Group (DPG) has recently announced the appointment of five external experts to join their team, bringing in a wealth of experience and knowledge to support the company's growth. The experts will play a crucial role in providing additional resources for the Group's expansion. This announcement comes following DPG receiving the prestigious 2024 Life Sciences Innovation Award. Located in Blainville, QC, the company is showing a strong commitment to advancing in the industry with the new team members.
news.headline: Duchesnay Pharmaceutical Group establishes Advisory Board with 5 external experts to drive growth and success.

news.summary: In Oak Ridge, Tennessee, BWX Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: BWXT) has revealed plans to enhance the nation's uranium enrichment capacity. The company has acquired about 97 acres of land in the Horizon Center Industrial Park for this purpose. This move signifies BWXT's dedication to aiding future defense efforts and reinforcing the domestic uranium enrichment infrastructure. The land acquisition is part of a broader strategy to assist the U.S. Department of Energy's National Nuclear Security Administration in their missions.
news.headline: BWXT buys 97 acres in Oak Ridge for domestic uranium enrichment, backing U.S. defense missions.

news.summary: In Boise, Idaho, Albertsons Companies, Inc. has disclosed that its Board of Directors has approved a cash dividend of $0.15 for the first quarter per share of common stock.
news.headline: Albertsons Companies declares $0.15 dividend per share for Q1. Board of Directors approves cash dividend.

news.summary: In Columbia, Maryland, on April 15, 2025, Sealing Technologies, a subsidiary of Parsons Corporation (NYSE: PSN) and a prominent player in defensive cyber operations solutions for U.S. national security missions, has introduced two cutting-edge edge computing nodes. These new nodes promise advanced capabilities in enhancing cyber defenses.
news.headline: SealingTech launches 2 new edge computing nodes to aid US national security missions by Parsons Corporation.

news.summary: In Lisbon, Portugal on April 15, 2025, U POWER LIMITED, a prominent company in green smart energy grid technology, announced groundbreaking initiatives alongside ELMO joint venture partner ANTRAL. This unveiling took place during ANTRAL's 50th Anniversary & XVI Taxi Day event. The collaboration focuses on revolutionizing urban mobility and marks a significant milestone in the industry.
news.headline: U Power Limited and ELMO partner to bring rapid battery-swapping for Portugal's taxis, announced at ANTRAL's 50th Anniversary event.

news.summary: Matthew Doull has been appointed as the Senior Managing Director in Investment Banking at B. Riley Securities Holdings, Inc. Drew Crum will now focus on covering Media & Entertainment within Equity Research, while Erik Suppiger will cover Enterprise Software & Security. This announcement was made on April 15, 2025, from Los Angeles.
news.headline: B. Riley Sec. adds 3 senior members to Tech, Media, Telecom team: Mathew Doull as MD, Drew Crum for M&E, Erik Suppiger for Software & Security. LOS ANGELES, Apr 15, 2025.

news.summary: Toronto-based company DeFi Technologies Inc., also known as DeFi Technologies, is making waves in the financial technology sector. The company, trading under CBOE CA: DEFI, GR: R9B, and OTC: DEFTF, is dedicated to merging traditional capital markets with the innovative world of decentralized finance.
news.headline: DeFi Technologies files amended Form 40-F with SEC; company focused on traditional finance & DeFi convergence.
